chapter_title.ar: بَابُ أَنَّ الْأَئِمَّةَ ( عليهم السلام ) يَعْلَمُونَ مَتَى يَمُوتُونَ وَ أَنَّهُمْ لَا يَمُوتُونَ إِلَّا بِاخْتِيَارٍ مِنْهُمْ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 47 – The Imams<sup>asws</sup> are knowing when they<sup>asws</sup> would be passing away, and they<sup>asws</sup> are not passing away except by a choice from them<sup>asws</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/128)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/128)
text: أَنْزَلَ اللَّهُ تَعَالَى النَّصْرَ عَلَى الْحُسَيْنِ ( عليه السلام ) حَتَّى كَانَ مَا بَيْنَ السَّمَاءِ وَ الْأَرْضِ ثُمَّ خُيِّرَ النَّصْرَ أَوْ لِقَاءَ اللَّهِ فَاخْتَارَ لِقَاءَ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Sayf Bin Ameyra, from Abdul Malik Bin Ayn,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Allah<sup>azwj</sup> the Exalted Sent down the Help upon Al-Husayn<sup>asws</sup> until it was (suspended in) what is between the sky and the earth. Then He<sup>azwj</sup> Gave him<sup>asws</sup> the choice, the Help or Meeting Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, so he<sup>asws</sup> chose meeting Allah<sup>azwj</sup> the Exalted’.
en.sarwar: 8. A number of our people has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Ali ibn al-Hakam from Sayf ibn ‘Umayra from ‘Abd al-Malik ibn A‘yan from abu Ja‘far (a.s.) who has said the following. “Allah, the Most Holy, the Most High, sent support for Imam al-Husayn (a.s.) up to the fill between the heavens and earth. Then he was let to choose either victory or meeting Allah. He, however, chose the meeting of Allah the Most High.”
